title: Fix Makefile to handle PREFIX correctly
body:
PREFIX should default to /usr/local according to GNU coding standards.

DESTDIR should just be used for install

This will allow us to specify

make PREFIX=/usr DESTDIR=/tmp/build/ install

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Hello,
What's blocking this PR? I'd like to update my PR (https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1165) so that it could be merged too.
Since this PR has now passed test, merging.
